items.name: tradingview-mcp
items.description: Real-time crypto & stock screening, advanced technical indicators, Bollinger Bands intelligence, candlestick patterns + native Claude Desktop integration. Multi-exchange (Binance, KuCoin, Bybit+). Open-source AI trading infrastructure.

items.name: Gmail-MCP-Server
items.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Gmail integration in Claude Desktop with auto authentication support. This server enables AI assistants to manage Gmail through natural language interactions.

items.name: Everywhere
items.description: Context-aware AI assistant for your desktop. Ready to respond intelligently, seamlessly integrating multiple LLMs and MCP tools.

items.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
items.description: An MCP Server for Chrome DevTools, following the Chrome DevTools Protocol. Integrates with Claude Desktop and Claude Code.

items.name: open-cowork
items.description: Open-source AI agent desktop app for Windows & macOS. One-click install Claude Code, MCP tools, and Skills — with sandbox isolation, multi-model support, and Feishu/Slack integration.

items.name: tuui
items.description: A desktop MCP client designed as a tool unitary utility integration, accelerating AI adoption through the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and enabling cross-vendor LLM API orchestration.

items.name: mcp-claude-spotify
items.description: An integration that allows Claude Desktop to interact with Spotify using the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

items.name: google-calendar-mcp
items.description: Google Calendar MCP server for Claude Desktop integration
